name: Tesla
description:
On detonation, this grenade creates a short-lived shock field around the impact point, repeatedly zapping enemies that enter the visible radius. It is strong in corridors and chokepoints, discouraging pushes and helping control space, and it is effective against slow or stationary targets.

Unlike most area grenades, it does not harm allies. The lightning only seeks out enemies.
notes:
Drops randomly from suitable loot sources.

Its arcs can strike thrown buzz axes passing through the field.

If positioned within range above or below a target, the lightning can bypass shields.

It will not hit enemies while they are cloaked; however, draining their shields can force them to reveal themselves and stop them re-entering stealth.

Named after electrical engineer Nikola Tesla.
